item.title: Crimson Desert sales top three million
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Xbox Series

An additional one million units sold.

Total sales for open-world action adventure game Crimson Desert have surpassed three million units, developer Pearl Abyss announced.

“We are grateful to share Crimson Desert has sold through three million copies worldwide,” Pearl Abyss said. “To everyone who has stepped into Pywel and shared this journey with us, thank you. Your feedback continues to help shape the experience, and we will keep working to make the journey ahead even more enjoyable for our players.”

Crimson Desert launched for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC via Steam and Epic Games Store on March 19. It surpassed two million sales just one day after release.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/crimson-desert-sales-top-three-million
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
